jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - upGrad - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Teacher looking for your next big career move? upGrad in Nagpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About upGrad:
upGrad is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with upGrad!
